_publications._publicationTitle: C6 Cell Injection into the Optic Nerve of Long-Evans Rats: A Short-Term Model of Optic Pathway Gliomas.

_contextSnippet: CD45 staining of the test animals shows typical minimal staining usually seen in the rodent models in which resident microglial are not highly activated for low-grade tumors, while control eyes show no presence of CD45 expression
details: Showed minimal staining in test animals typical for low-grade tumors, while control eyes showed no CD45 expression
